gist.headline: Counting the pollen
gist.blurb: We built a shiny new internal tool to help us track our infrastructure costs and keep the hive running smoothly.
gist.summary: Added a new internal CLI tool for automated financial tracking and infrastructure cost forecasting.
gist.impact: This helps the core team monitor provider billing and manage resources more efficiently behind the scenes.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant, reviewing receipts and spreadsheets. Nomnom creature helping by eating the processed receipts. Represents financial tracking and processing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk with a retro calculator and stacks of paper receipts. The round tan nomnom creature is happily eating a long paper receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk with a retro calculator and stacks of paper receipts. The round tan nomnom creature is happily eating a long paper receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
